source.placeLookup: Google Places API exact brand/store matches
source.webSearch: BrightData MCP search/scrape plus Cursor WebSearch, Spanish-first research pass

validation.includedScope: Buenos Aires metro area places returned by Google Maps for exact brand/store matches with at least one browsable, brand-owned or standalone store/showroom.

excludedBrands.name: Cuero Buenos Aires
excludedBrands.reason: No exact operational Google Maps store match found; searches returned unrelated leather/clothing businesses.

excludedBrands.name: Carcione (Hector Carcione e Hijo)
excludedBrands.reason: Google Maps lists an operational restoration/caning shop, but the source notes classify it as restoration rather than a browsable furniture brand showroom.

excludedBrands.name: English Styles
excludedBrands.reason: Google Maps lists the Parana 1185 showroom as temporarily closed.

excludedBrands.name: Gris Dimension
excludedBrands.reason: Multi-brand importer showroom for B&B Italia, Flexform and Maxalto rather than a single independent brand.

excludedBrands.name: Kalpakian Casa
excludedBrands.reason: Multi-brand design hub with rotating third-party designer spaces, not a monobrand store.

excludedBrands.name: Andy Forn Casa
excludedBrands.reason: Showroom is inside the Rue des Artisans multi-brand gallery at Distrito Arenales.

excludedBrands.name: K&M Casa
excludedBrands.reason: Showroom is inside the Rue des Artisans multi-brand gallery at Distrito Arenales.

excludedBrands.name: Ana Menaz
excludedBrands.reason: Official site lists a Martinez location, but Google Places did not return an exact operational Ana Menaz place there; the Palermo place is permanently closed.

excludedBrands.name: Besform
excludedBrands.reason: Search results describe a showroom, but Google Places resolved the brand to Spain rather than Buenos Aires.

excludedBrands.name: Picardi
excludedBrands.reason: Official site lists an Avenida Belgrano showroom, but Google Places searches did not return an exact operational Picardi place.

excludedBrands.name: Morph
excludedBrands.reason: Primarily a home-goods/decor chain rather than a furniture-focused brand showroom.

excludedBrands.name: Tidelli Argentina
excludedBrands.reason: Operational Palermo place found, but no official website-backed Buenos Aires store page or review history was found during this pass.

validation.filteredOut: Shopping malls, unrelated furniture stores, generic leather shops, warehouses, low-confidence social-only listings, non-BA matches, and duplicate/non-showroom manufacturer listings were removed from the public list.
validation.chairPriceSource: Rechecked 2026-06-27 using BrightData Google search, BrightData scrapes of official brand/category pages, and regular web search cross-checks. Medians use current public online chair selling/list prices, divide explicit multi-chair sets by unit count, and exclude transfer/cash-only discounts plus financing installment amounts. Brands without public chair prices remain null with updated notes.
